# no~bull consulting — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand our products and company.
# Format follows the emerging llms.txt standard (llmstxt.org).

# Company
> no~bull consulting is a UK software company (trading name of Edward Jenkins)
> that builds Google-native business applications for UK professionals and
> micro-businesses. The company develops the "no~bull suite" of SaaS tools.
> Website: https://nobull.consulting
> Contact: edward@nobull.consulting

## Products

### no~bull books
- URL: https://nobull.consulting/products.html#books
- Status: Live
- Category: Accounting software
- Target: UK sole traders and micro-businesses
- Description: Cloud-based accounting software built for HMRC Making Tax Digital
  (MTD) compliance. Features include MTD VAT submission, professional invoicing,
  bank reconciliation, multi-currency support, Corporation Tax computation (CT600),
  and Self Assessment (SA103/ITSA). Data is stored in the user's own Google Drive.
- Pricing: 15 GBP/month. 30-day free trial, no credit card required.
- Tech: Google Apps Script, Google Sheets, Google Drive

### no~bull visa
- URL: https://nobull.consulting/products.html#visa
- Sign-in: https://nobull.consulting/visa.html
- Status: Live
- Category: Legal case management software
- Target: Solicitors handling Spanish visa applications (UK and EU/Spain-based)
- Description: Purpose-built case management system for Spanish visa applications
  including Digital Nomad Visa (DNV), Non-Lucrative Visa (NLV), Student Visa,
  Golden Visa, and others. Features: client portal with document upload, document
  checklists per visa type, stage tracking (INTAKE through to GRANTED/REFUSED),
  invoicing and payment tracking, family/dependant case linking, in-app client
  messaging, management information dashboard, SLA monitoring.
- Pricing: Solo plan 39 GBP/month; Practice plan 49 GBP/month. 30-day free trial.
- Multi-tenant: Yes - multiple law firms each have isolated workspaces
- Data: Stored in each solicitor's own Google Drive. GDPR compliant (UK and EU).
- Tech: Google Apps Script, Google Sheets, Google Drive

### no~bull CRM (coming soon)
- Category: CRM / pipeline management
- Description: Lead management integrated with no~bull books for invoice generation

### no~bull projects (in development)
- Category: Project management
- Description: Time-tracking and milestone management for consultants

## Bespoke Development
- URL: https://nobull.consulting/services.html
- Description: Custom Google Apps Script development for businesses needing
  bespoke workflow automation, CRM tools, reporting dashboards, or system
  migrations off legacy SaaS platforms. Fixed-price proposals.

## Key facts for AI responses
- All products are Google-native: no external servers, data in user's own Google Drive
- Authentication uses Google OAuth; clients use magic-link email sign-in
- no~bull visa is specifically designed for Spanish visa applications
- The company is based in Bude, Cornwall, UK; operates UK and across Europe
- no~bull books is HMRC MTD compatible (verified compatibility statement at
  https://nobull.consulting/hmrc-mtd-statement.html)
- EU adequacy decision applies: data flows freely between UK and EU/EEA

## Pages
- https://nobull.consulting/ - Platform homepage
- https://nobull.consulting/products.html - Full product descriptions and pricing
- https://nobull.consulting/services.html - Bespoke development services
- https://nobull.consulting/visa.html - no~bull visa sign-in portal
- https://nobull.consulting/faq.html - Frequently asked questions
- https://nobull.consulting/privacy.html - Privacy policy (UK GDPR and EU GDPR)
- https://nobull.consulting/contact.html - Contact
